response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong technical leadership with 15+ years of software engineering across diverse domains and proven entrepreneurial experience, he lacks the core qualification for this role: demonstrated AI strategy expertise and a track record of building or leading AI-powered products at scale. His recent entry into AI-agent infrastructure (April 2025) is a positive signal of learning agility, but insufficient for a director-level AI Strategy position that requires recognized AI expertise, strategic vision, and ability to advise customers on AI adoption. The role fundamentally requires deep AI platform knowledge, not general software leadership.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse full-stack and infrastructure engineering with staff/principal roles, meeting seniority expectations
Proven entrepreneurial track record founding GISCollective and strong community/teaching presence demonstrating thought leadership
Solid cloud and infrastructure experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) providing foundational cloud platform knowledge
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise—current AI work is only 1-2 months old and focused on infrastructure tooling, not strategic AI product or platform experience
No advanced degree in AI, ML, or related field despite being a preferred qualification for AI strategy role
No evidence of recognized AI expertise or track record building/leading AI-powered products, which is essential for credibly advising strategic customers on AI adoption

key_factors.factor: AI strategy expertise and platform experience
